pi_items.verified_value: Custom incident type (not found in standard OpenCAD 10-code system)
pi_items.source: Web fetch of official OpenCAD-php GitHub repository (opencad-app/OpenCAD-php release/stable branch) confirmed that standard incident types use 10-code format from 10-0 to 10-84 (e.g., 10-50 'Vehicle Accident', 10-82 'Fire in Progress'). Search for 'Rock Slide' in incident_types table returned no results. This is a custom incident type created for this task.

pi_items.verified_value: Custom location (not found in official OpenCAD GTAV streets database)
pi_items.source: Web fetch of official OpenCAD-php GitHub repository (opencad-app/OpenCAD-php release/stable branch) confirmed that the streets table contains 217 entries across Los Santos County, Blaine County, State routes, and Postal codes. The database includes streets with 'Haul' (Hanger Way, Hangman Avenue) and 'Road' variations, but no 'North Haul Road'. Search for 'North Haul' and 'Haul Road' returned no matches. This is a custom location created for this task.

privileged_info_summary: The dispatch_new_incident_type task operates on OpenCAD, a real open-source Computer Aided Dispatch system that uses official GTA V game data. The task requires creating a custom incident type named 'Rock Slide' (not in the standard OpenCAD 10-code system) and creating a dispatch call at a custom location 'North Haul Road' (not in the official GTAV streets database). Both metadata values are synthetic test values created specifically for this task, not derived from standard OpenCAD or GTA V data. The task exercises the system's ability to add new incident types and create dispatch calls with custom data.
